heading: Fair charge for use of Government-owned property
label: 643 Fair charge for use of Government-owned property
text: To the fullest extent the Administration deems practicable, it shall make a fair charge for the use of Government-owned property and make and let contracts on a basis that will result in a recovery of the direct costs incurred by the Administration.
